headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $25
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Cooper Clark   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $23 to $25.
